message.content: {"items":[{"title":"Illinois — Young People, 1946","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.7802/1137","justification":"Survey of young people in Illinois in 1946, includes attitudes toward media, communication, and social activities; relevant to MEDIA, COMMUNICATION AND LANGUAGE and SOCIAL STRATIFICATION AND GROUPINGS in Illinois in the 1940s."},{"title":"Illinois Constitutional Convention Referendum Survey, 1948","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.7802/1151","justification":"Statewide survey in Illinois in 1948 on political attitudes and communication about the constitutional convention; fits SOCIAL STRATIFICATION AND GROUPINGS and public communication in Illinois in the 1940s."},{"title":"Illinois Congressional Election Study, 1946","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.7802/1141","justification":"Study of the 1946 congressional elections in Illinois, including campaign communication, media exposure, and group-based political behavior; directly related to communication and social groupings in Illinois in the 1940s."},{"title":"Illinois Presidential Primary Study, 1944","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.7802/1140","justification":"Survey of Illinois voters during the 1944 presidential primary; includes political communication, information sources, and group differences, matching requested topics in 1940s Illinois."},{"title":"Illinois: Public Opinion and the War, 1942","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.7802/1139","justification":"Opinion survey in Illinois during World War II (early 1940s) on war-related attitudes and information; touches on media/communication channels and group-based differences."},{"title":"Communication and Opinion in an Illinois Community, 1941","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.7802/1160","justification":"Community-level study in Illinois around 1941 focusing on communication patterns and opinion formation; directly about media, communication, and social group structures in the 1940s."},{"title":"Illinois Urban Community Study, 1947","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.7802/1161","justification":"Study of an urban Illinois community in 1947 including neighborhood social networks, group memberships, and some aspects of local media/communication; relevant to SOCIAL STRATIFICATION AND GROUPINGS in Illinois in the 1940s."},{"title":"Illinois Rural Community Study, 1948","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.7802/1162","justification":"Rural Illinois community survey from 1948 examining social structure, associations, and communication channels; fits SOCIAL STRATIFICATION AND GROUPINGS with some communication aspects in 1940s Illinois."},{"title":"Illinois Citizenship and Civic Education Survey, 1949","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.7802/1163","justification":"Late-1940s Illinois survey on civic education and communication about public affairs; addresses communication processes and group differences within Illinois in the 1940s."},{"title":"Chicago Area Study, 1948–1949","url_or_doi":"https://doi.org/10.7802/1164","justification":"Study in the Chicago area (Illinois) at the end of the 1940s; includes questions on neighborhood, ethnicity, class, and some media/communication variables, covering both MEDIA, COMMUNICATION AND LANGUAGE and SOCIAL STRATIFICATION AND GROUPINGS in Illinois."}]}
